Publications CV GitHub

Hello! I am Yuheng Zhao (赵宇恒). I received my Ph.D. in Statistics from the School of Data Science at Fudan University, supervised by Prof. Siming Chen in FDUVIS Lab. I was also a visiting PhD student at the University of Edinburgh, supervised by Prof. Benjamin Bach in VisHub. I also completed a research internship advised by Dr. Yu Zhang.

My research focuses on LLM-driven intelligent visual analytics, human-AI collaboration, and human-computer interaction. I combine methods from visualization, artificial intelligence, and human-computer interaction to build intelligent interfaces that help people understand complex data and coordinate with AI agents.

💬 News
👩🏻‍💻 I will join ELLIS Institute Finland & Computational Behavior Lab in Aalto University.
Jun 10, 26
🎉 Our paper ProactiveVA and SceneLoom have been accepted to IEEE VIS '25. Also, KinemaFX has been accepted to ACM UIST '25!
Jul 15, 25
🎉 Two papers are accepted to PacificVis 2025, with one receiving the 🏆 Best Paper Honorable Mention!
Apr 24, 25
🎉 Our paper "LightVA: Lightweight Visual Analytics with LLM Agent-Based Task Planning and Execution" has been accepted to IEEE TVCG 2024 — looking forward to sharing more soon!
Oct 28, 24
🎉 Our paper "LEVA: Using Large Language Models to Enhance Visual Analytics" has been accepted to IEEE TVCG 2024.
Jan 25, 24
👩🏻‍💻 Wrapped up an research internship at Huawei (2012 Lab) — grateful for the opportunity and mentorship.
Sep 25, 23
🎉 Our paper "OldVisOnline: Curating a Dataset of Historical Visualizations" has been accepted to IEEE VIS 2023 — excited to contribute to historical visualization research!
Jul 16, 23
🎉 Our paper "ContextWing: Pair-wise Visual Comparison for Evolving Sequential Patterns of Contexts in Social Media Data Streams" has been accepted to CSCW 2023.
Oct 01, 22
  • Email: yuhengzhao@fudan.edu.cn
